MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF FREDERICK MAYTAG'S Motion To Compel Arbitration, To Appoint An Arbitrator And To Stay Proceedings is Off calendar as to Department 302. The matter should be re-set in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. (See SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
